enrichedData.name: 如心廣場 (商業)
enrichedData.notes: Multiple units available for lease at HK$23-25/sq ft. Confirmed 88-floor Grade A office building.

enrichedData.name: 華懋中心一期
enrichedData.availabilitySource: Chinachem Official Website - Phase I fully leased
enrichedData.notes: 16-floor Grade A office in Central. All commercial units leased upon completion.

enrichedData.name: 華懋中心二期
enrichedData.yearSource: Chinachem Official Press Release (Dec 2016 - Q2 2017 occupancy)
enrichedData.availabilitySource: Chinachem Leasing - 60% leased at launch, now available
enrichedData.notes: 22-floor Grade A office. LEED Silver certified. Part of Chinachem Centre redevelopment project.

enrichedData.name: 華懋大廈
enrichedData.notes: 34-37 Connaught Road Central. Historic Chinachem landmark. Centanet records show 1967 but official website confirms 1966.

enrichedData.name: 華懋世紀廣場
enrichedData.notes: 26-floor office in Wan Chai. 93,000 sq ft. Some units becoming available in mid-2026.

enrichedData.name: One Hennessy
enrichedData.notes: Former Asian House (熙信大廈) built 1969. Redeveloped into modern Grade A office. 300,000+ sq ft.

enrichedData.name: 華懋中心 I期
enrichedData.notes: Likely refers to Chinachem Golden Plaza (華懋廣場) at 77 Mody Road. 20 floors, 445,000 sq ft.

enrichedData.name: 華懋中心 II期
enrichedData.notes: May refer to second phase of Chinachem Centre complex. Requires verification from Chinachem leasing team.

enrichedData.name: 華懋金馬倫中心
enrichedData.notes: 42-44 Cameron Road, TST. 18 floors. 42,000 sq ft GFA. Features private club, fitness centre.

enrichedData.name: 華懋333廣場
enrichedData.yearSource: Midland ICI (1996) / Landvision (1998) - Using 1996 as more conservative
enrichedData.notes: 333 Castle Peak Road, Cheung Sha Wan. 14-15 floors. Grade B office. Conflicting year data: 1996 vs 1998.

enrichedData.name: 利園八期
enrichedData.notes: Joint venture with Henderson Land. Green commercial landmark. 1,000,000+ sq ft. Future availability.

enrichedData.name: 如心廣場商場
enrichedData.yearSource: Chinachem Official Website (part of Nina Tower complex)
enrichedData.notes: Part of Nina Tower complex. Base retail floors of the 88-floor tower.

enrichedData.name: D·PARK愉景新城
enrichedData.notes: Acquired from New World Development for HK$4.02 billion. 630,000 sq ft. Originally built by New World (year unknown).

enrichedData.name: 中環街市
enrichedData.notes: Historic building revitalized as 'Playground for All'. F&B and shopping destination.

enrichedData.name: NINA MALL 1
enrichedData.yearSource: Chinachem Official / abcarihk.com (former Tsuen Wan Centre Mall, rebranded 2018)
enrichedData.notes: Formerly Tsuen Wan Centre Mall. Rebranded as NINA MALL 1 in 2018. 170,000 sq ft, 55 shops.

enrichedData.name: NINA MALL 2
enrichedData.yearSource: Nina Mall Website / Property Records (connected to Tsuen Wan West Station development)
enrichedData.notes: New development connected to Tsuen Wan West Station. 100,000 sq ft, 44 shops.

enrichedData.name: 瑜一 (In One)
enrichedData.yearSource: Under construction - no reliable completion year found
enrichedData.notes: Ho Man Tin luxury residential. Currently under development/sale. Estimated completion 2025-2026 (not confirmed).

enrichedData.name: WHITESAND COVE
enrichedData.notes: Sai Kung low-density luxury residential. 40 units. Currently under development.

enrichedData.name: 荃灣西如心酒店
enrichedData.notes: Flagship hotel. 1,608 rooms. 88 floors. Largest hotel in Nina Hotel Group.

enrichedData.name: 銅鑼灣如心酒店
enrichedData.yearSource: Nina Hotel Group Official Website / Ctrip / Wing On Travel
enrichedData.notes: First Nina Hotel. Opened December 2005. 37 floors, 275 rooms. Renovated 2015.

enrichedData.name: 如心酒店 · 南灣
enrichedData.yearSource: Nina Hotel Group Official Website (converted from factory building)
enrichedData.notes: Former factory building in Wong Chuk Hang. Converted and opened 2010. Major HK$120M renovation completed March 2026.

enrichedData.name: 如心酒店 · 東九龍
enrichedData.notes: First Nina Hotel in Kowloon. Located in Kwun Tong commercial district.

enrichedData.name: 木的地酒店 · 旺角
enrichedData.yearSource: Nina Hotel Group Official Website / Baidu Baike
enrichedData.notes: First Lodgewood brand hotel (economy tier). 87 rooms. Opened April 2013.

enrichedData.name: 薈賢居 · 灣仔
enrichedData.notes: Serviced apartments. Single and double bedroom units.

enrichedData.name: The Lily
enrichedData.yearSource: Property Database / Nina Hotel Group (managed since 2020)
enrichedData.availabilitySource: Luxury residential - managed by Nina Hospitality
enrichedData.notes: Repulse Bay luxury residential. Sir Norman Foster architect. 100 units. Managed by Nina since July 2020.

enrichedData.name: 如心園
enrichedData.notes: Asia's largest urban wood fossil park. 70,000 sq ft. Over 100 museum-grade wood fossils. 'Playground for All' project.

enrichedData.name: 松心薈
enrichedData.notes: Flagship 'Shang Qi · Xian Ju' series. 188 beds. 35,400 sq ft. Premium elderly care in Causeway Bay.

enrichedData.name: 松齡康輝護老中心
enrichedData.nameEn: Pine Care Hong Fai Elderly Centre
enrichedData.notes: Sai Wan Ho. 3 floors. Established during 2000-2009 expansion period per company records.

enrichedData.name: 松暉護老中心
enrichedData.notes: Kwun Tong. 2 floors. Opened 1999 per company milestone records.

enrichedData.name: 新松齡護老中心
enrichedData.yearSource: Pine Care Group Records (relocated to Shun Lee Estate)
enrichedData.notes: Shun Lee Estate, Kwun Tong. Relocated to current location in 2010.

enrichedData.name: 松齡(利富)護老中心
enrichedData.yearSource: Pine Care Group Prospectus (established during 2010-2019 period)
enrichedData.notes: Shun Lee Estate, Lee Foo House. Established during 2010 expansion.

enrichedData.name: 松齡樂軒
enrichedData.yearSource: Pine Care Group ESG Report 2019 (H2 2019 establishment)
enrichedData.notes: Shek Kip Mei. Specialist RCHE for dementia care. Opened H2 2019.

enrichedData.name: 松齡(萬年)護老中心
enrichedData.notes: Tsz Wan Shan. 4 floors. Opened 2003 per company records.

enrichedData.name: 松齡(德豐)護老中心
enrichedData.yearSource: Pine Care Group Prospectus (relocated from Tsz Wan Shan in 2012)
enrichedData.notes: Prince Edward (Mongkok). Relocated from Tsz Wan Shan to current location in 2012.

enrichedData.name: 松齡雅苑
enrichedData.notes: Yuen Long YOHO MALL. Premium RCHE. 68 beds. 33,000 sq ft. First upscale facility.

enrichedData.name: 松齡(保德)護老中心
enrichedData.notes: Kwai Fong. Acquired in 2010 during expansion phase.

enrichedData.name: 松齡俊景護老中心
enrichedData.yearSource: Pine Care Group Records (relocated from Po Tak Branch)
enrichedData.notes: Tsuen Wan. Relocated from previous Po Tak Branch location in 2017.

enrichedData.name: 松齡翠軒
enrichedData.yearSource: Pine Care Group Website / HKTB (first government contract facility)
enrichedData.notes: Sheung Shui Kwu Tung North. First government contract facility. Welfare Services Complex.
